title: Create: Zinc Recipe
description: Adds a recipe for zinc in the create mod.
body:
Ever wanted to craft Zinc in the Create mod, but couldn't? Well with this simple mod you can! This mod makes it so Raw Zinc is craftable to smelt it!

All you need is Lapis and Iron Nugget and you have Zinc! Automate making your Zinc like never before!

Requires Create: https://modrinth.com/mod/create
